title: Heart Loss SMP
description:
Welcome to Heart Loss
Heart Loss is a session based exclusive Minecraft survival series for content creators. You start with 40 hearts losing 1 every time you die or when a week has passed, when you run out of hearts you are eliminated from the series.
body:
Welcome to Heart Loss
Heart Loss is a session based exclusive Minecraft survival series for content creators.
You start with 40 hearts losing 1 every time you die or when a week has passed, when you run out of hearts you are eliminated from the series.
Modpack Assembled by DanInACan
